meta.summary: Picard 3.4.0 Java command-line tools for manipulating high-throughput sequencing data and formats.
meta.description: Picard 3.4.0 Java command-line tools for manipulating high-throughput sequencing data and formats.

test: picard FastqToSam --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Version:3.4.0' >/dev/null && picard CreateSequenceDictionary --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Version:3.4.0' >/dev/null

picard -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Available Programs:' >/dev/null && picard -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'FastqToSam' >/dev/null && picard -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'MarkDuplicates' >/dev/null && picard -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'MergeVcfs' >/dev/null

picard FastqToSam --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: FastqToSam' >/dev/null && picard SamToFastq --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: SamToFastq' >/dev/null && picard CreateSequenceDictionary --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: CreateSequenceDictionary' >/dev/null && picard ValidateSamFile --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: ValidateSamFile' >/dev/null

picard MarkDuplicates --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: MarkDuplicates' >/dev/null && picard MergeSamFiles --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: MergeSamFiles' >/dev/null && picard CollectAlignmentSummaryMetrics --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: CollectAlignmentSummaryMetrics' >/dev/null && picard CollectInsertSizeMetrics --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: CollectInsertSizeMetrics' >/dev/null && picard BedToIntervalList --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: BedToIntervalList' >/dev/null && picard MergeVcfs --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'USAGE: MergeVcfs' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-picard-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > ref.fa; PICARD_JAVA_XMX=512m picard CreateSequenceDictionary R=ref.fa O=ref.dict QUIET=true >/tmp/taf-picard-dict.log 2>&1; test -s ref.dict && grep -F 'SN:chr1' ref.dict >/dev/null && grep -F 'LN:16' ref.dict >/dev/null; printf '@r1
ACGTACGT
+
IIIIIIII
' > reads.fq; PICARD_JAVA_XMX=512m picard FastqToSam F1=reads.fq O=reads.bam SM=sample RG=rg1 QUALITY_FORMAT=Standard QUIET=true >/tmp/taf-picard-fastqtosam.log 2>&1; test -s reads.bam; PICARD_JAVA_XMX=512m picard SamToFastq I=reads.bam FASTQ=roundtrip.fq QUIET=true >/tmp/taf-picard-samtofastq.log 2>&1; test -s roundtrip.fq && grep -F '@r1' roundtrip.fq >/dev/null && grep -F 'ACGTACGT' roundtrip.fq >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-picard-dict.log /tmp/taf-picard-fastqtosam.log /tmp/taf-picard-samtofastq.log

tmp=/tmp/taf-picard-r-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; Rscript --version >/tmp/taf-picard-rscript.log 2>&1; printf '@r1
ACGTACGT
+
IIIIIIII
' > reads.fq; PICARD_JAVA_XMX=512m picard FastqToSam F1=reads.fq O=reads.bam SM=sample RG=rg1 QUALITY_FORMAT=Standard QUIET=true >/tmp/taf-picard-r-fastqtosam.log 2>&1; PICARD_JAVA_XMX=512m picard MeanQualityByCycle I=reads.bam O=mean_quality.txt CHART_OUTPUT=mean_quality.pdf QUIET=true >/tmp/taf-picard-mean-quality.log 2>&1; test -s mean_quality.txt && test -s mean_quality.pdf && grep -F 'MEAN_QUALITY' mean_quality.txt >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-picard-rscript.log /tmp/taf-picard-r-fastqtosam.log /tmp/taf-picard-mean-quality.log

upstream.name: Picard
upstream.citation: Picard Toolkit. 2019. Broad Institute, GitHub Repository; RRID:SCR_006525; biotools:picard_tools
